# Security policy

Please do not disclose suspected vulnerabilities in a public issue.

Use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting form](https://github.com/brunoportis/localqueue/security/advisories/new)
to share reproduction details and impact privately with the maintainer. General
security configuration is visible on the repository's
[Security page](https://github.com/brunoportis/localqueue/security).

Supported versions are the versions currently published on PyPI. The maintainer
will acknowledge a report, coordinate remediation and publication, and credit the
reporter when requested and appropriate.
